description_long: This is a low-top sneaker with a minimalist design, featuring a smooth white upper and a contrasting black sole. The shoe has a rounded toe and is equipped with white laces threaded through six pairs of eyelets. The side profile reveals a clean, unadorned surface with subtle stitching along the edges, while the heel is reinforced and slightly padded for comfort. The sole appears to be made of rubber, providing durability and grip for urban walking. The interior is likely lined with fabric or synthetic material for added comfort. There are no visible logos or branding elements on the exterior.
description: A minimalist white low-top sneaker with a black rubber sole and white laces, featuring a clean, unbranded design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded toe, white laces, and the smooth upper surface.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the clean, unadorned profile and the black sole.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the reinforced heel and the opening for the foot.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the simple design and black sole.
